description: Bill of divorce (geṭ). Location: Fustat. Dated: Sunday, 7 Ḥeshvan 1445 Seleucid, which is 1133 CE. Written and signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Also signed by Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen. Husband: Yeshuʿa b. Mevasser. Wife: Diyār bt. Yefet. Verso is blank (i.e., lacking confirmation that she received the geṭ). Goitein's index card notes that the Diyār bt. Yefet in ENA 4011.6 (ca. 1158 CE) is probably a different person.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
